mapper.select: select count(1) from cmp_flow_handle_setting where code in ('system0101','system0102','system0103','system0104','system0201', 'system0202','system0301','system0302','system0303','system0304','system0401','system0402') and is_system=1 and ytenant_id = #{ytenantId}
mapper.delete: delete from cmp_flow_handle_setting where code in ('system0101','system0102','system0103','system0104','system0201', 'system0202','system0301','system0302','system0303','system0304','system0401','system0402') and is_system=1
delete from cmp_fhs_publish_range where mainid in (select id from cmp_flow_handle_setting where code='system0401' and `is_system`= 1)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `cmp_flow_handle_setting` (`id`,`association_bill_range`, `association_mode`, `code`, `enable`, `flow_type`, `is_arti_confirm`, `is_random_auto_confirm`, `is_system`, `is_termination_flow`, `msg_type`, `name`, `name2`,`name3`,`name4`,`name5`,`name6`, `object`, `org`, `pubts`, `remark`, `send_msg`, `sort_num`, `tenant_id`, `ytenant_id`) values (#{id03},NULL,1, 'system0103', '1', 1, 2, 0, 1, 1, '1,2', '银行流水关联收付单据自动处理流程', 'Automatic processing flow of collection and payment documents associated with bank flow','銀行流水關聯收付單據自動處理流程',NULL,NULL,NULL, 1, '666666', #{pubts}, NULL, 0, 1, #{tenantId}, #{ytenantId})

INSERT INTO `cmp_flow_handle_setting` (`id`,`association_credential_mode`, `association_credential_range`, `code`, `enable`, `flow_type`, `is_random_auto_confirm`, `is_system`, `is_termination_flow`, `msg_type`, `name`, `name2`,`name3`,`name4`,`name5`,`name6`, `object`, `org`, `publish_mode`, `publish_range`, `pubts`, `send_msg`, `sort_num`,`receipt_rel_ishandle`, `tenant_id`, `ytenant_id`) values (#{id05},2, 2, 'system0201', '1',2, NULL, 1, 1, '1,2', '银行流水关联业务凭据手工处理流程', 'Manual processing flow of bank flow association business credentials','銀行流水關聯業務憑據手工處理流程',NULL,NULL,NULL, 1, '666666', NULL, NULL, #{pubts}, 1, 1, 0, #{tenantId}, #{ytenantId}), (#{id06},2, 2, 'system0202', '1', 2, NULL, 1, 1,'1,2', '认领单关联业务凭据手工处理流程', 'Manual Processing Process of Business Credentials Associated with Claim Form','認領單關聯業務憑據手工處理流程',NULL,NULL,NULL, 2, '666666', NULL, NULL, #{pubts}, 1, 1, 0, #{tenantId}, #{ytenantId});

INSERT INTO `cmp_flow_handle_setting` (`id`,`code`, `create_bill_mode`, `create_bill_range`,`enable`, `flow_type`, `is_arti_confirm`, `is_random_auto_confirm`, `is_system`, `is_termination_flow`, `msg_type`, `name`, `name2`,`name3`,`name4`,`name5`,`name6`, `object`, `org`,`pubts`, `send_msg`, `sort_num`, `tenant_id`, `ytenant_id`) values (#{id07},'system0301', 2, 2, '1', 3, NULL, NULL, 1, 1,'1,2', '银行流水手工生单处理流程', 'Bank flow manual order generation processing flow','銀行流水手工生單處理流程',NULL,NULL,NULL, 1, '666666', #{pubts}, 1, 2, #{tenantId}, #{ytenantId}), (#{id08},'system0302', 2, 2, '1', 3, NULL, NULL, 1, 1, '1,2', '认领手工生单处理流程', 'Processing flow of claiming manual order generation','認領手工生單處理流程',NULL,NULL,NULL, 2, '666666', #{pubts}, 1, 2, #{tenantId}, #{ytenantId}), (#{id09},'system0303', 1, 1, '1', 3, 1, NULL, 1, 1, '1,2', '银行流水自动生单处理流程', 'Bank flow automatic order generation processing flow','銀行流水自動生單處理流程',NULL,NULL,NULL, 1, '666666', #{pubts}, 1, 1, #{tenantId}, #{ytenantId}), (#{id010},'system0304', 1, 1, '1', 3, 1, NULL, 1, 1, '1,2', '认领单自动生单处理流程', 'Automatic Order Generation Process Flow of Claim Form','認領單自動生單處理流程',NULL,NULL,NULL, 2, '666666', #{pubts}, 1, 1, #{tenantId}, #{ytenantId});

INSERT INTO `cmp_flow_handle_setting` (`id`,`code`,`enable`, `flow_type`,`is_system`, `is_termination_flow`, `msg_type`, `name`, `name2`,`name3`,`name4`,`name5`,`name6`, `object`, `org`, `publish_mode`, `publish_range`, `pubts`, `remark`, `send_msg`, `sort_num`, `tenant_id`, `ytenant_id`) values (#{id011},'system0401', '1', 4, 1, 1, '2', '银行流水手工发布处理流程', 'Bank Flow Manual Publishing Process','銀行流水手工發布處理流程',NULL,NULL,NULL, 1, '666666', 2, 1, #{pubts}, NULL, 1, 2, #{tenantId}, #{ytenantId}), (#{id012},'system0402', '1', 4, 1, 1, '2', '银行流水自动发布处理流程', 'Bank flow automatic release processing flow','銀行流水自動發布處理流程',NULL,NULL,NULL, 1, '666666', 1, 2, #{pubts}, NULL, 1, 2, #{tenantId}, #{ytenantId});
